result.name: Tweedledee’s umbrella
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Form: Large umbrella with a sharp point on the end Effect: Touch a creature (up to the artifact’s level) of any size and the umbrella will fold up around it, capturing it inside. Holding the umbrella with the captive inside is an action. A caught character is held for ten minutes or until they make a successful Might roll to break free. Depletion: 1 in 1d10

sections.name: Tweedledee’s umbrella
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 2

Form: Large umbrella with a sharp point on the end

Effect: Touch a creature (up to the artifact’s level) of any size and the umbrella will fold up around it, capturing it inside. Holding the umbrella with the captive inside is an action. A caught character is held for ten minutes or until they make a successful Might roll to break free.

Depletion: 1 in 1d10
